description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Create a snapshot by creating a temporary VM, starting it, snapshotting it, then deleting the VM. Supports multi-layer recursive specs via `spec.snapshot`.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetch a single snapshot by id. Returns deleted/failed rows too — useful for opening a deep-link to a layer-snapshot that's since been cleaned up.

description.content:
Manage Linux microVMs designed for AI agents — create, snapshot, fork, suspend, resume, exec, file I/O, watch, systemd services, terminals, and resize. Real Linux VMs that start in under 600ms.

Contact Support:
 Name: Ben
 Email: ben@freestyle.sh
